ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market dataset */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of the commodities */,
  "total_volume" REAL /* Total volume of the commodities */,
  "total_bags" REAL /* Total number of bags */,
  "type" INTEGER /* Type of the market data (e.g., conventional, organic) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the market data */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the market data was collected */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the prices */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Year of the market data */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commodity_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commodity price */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market dataset the price belongs to */,
  "commodity" TEXT /* Name of the commodity */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the commodity */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commodity_prices_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_volumes" (
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales volume */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market dataset the volume belongs to */,
  "commodity" TEXT /* Name of the commodity */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the commodity */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the volume */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_volumes_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bags" (
  "bag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bag */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market dataset the bag belongs to */,
  "bag_type" TEXT /* Type of the bag (e.g., small, large, xlarge) */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the bag */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of each bag type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bags_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
